agent_types.description: Expert in a specific organizational domain who analyzes and resolves domain-specific challenges
Analyzes problems spanning multiple domains and proposes integrated solutions
Designs technical solutions for infrastructure and tooling problems

skill_types.description: Produce a concise recommendation with rationale, tradeoffs, and next steps
Create a phased implementation plan with timelines, owners, and success metrics
Write operational documentation like runbooks, playbooks, or standard operating procedures
Conduct a structured investigation with root cause analysis and findings
